name: alpen-deep-research
description: Open-web deep research with structured-entity extraction. Coordinates a 5-subagent pipeline (research → acquisition → processing → analysis → memory-orchestration) over a tiered web-acquisition stack (HTTP → Playwright → Chrome). Cross-cutting capability invoked by Sales (lead/account research), Legal (counter-party DD), Investments (manager DD), Knowledge (CCG client research), CompIntel (competitor profiling).
